\toprule
Item & Value
\\
\midrule
Synthetic mechanisms & Three bridge mechanisms and six stress mechanisms with known conditional quantiles. \\
Quantile grid & 0.05, 0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90, 0.95 \\
Fit window & 500 observations after DESN washout. \\
Held-out block & 1000 observations reserved for held-out validation. \\
VB comparison rows & Joint and independent QDESN and exQDESN readouts, all with the regularized horseshoe (RHS) prior. \\
Forecast design & No-refit rolling-origin forecasts over a common held-out origin grid. \\
Reported quantiles & Scores use the monotone grid obtained after rearrangement; pre-rearrangement crossings are retained as diagnostics. \\
MCMC reference & Fit-window, VB-initialized MCMC reference for the selected joint QDESN RHS row. \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{Joint multi-quantile validation protocol. The table reports the statistical design used for the article-facing summaries; source hashes and run-level provenance are recorded in the generated manifest.}
\label{tab:joint-qdesn-article-validation-protocol}
